projectDescription: A C++ SIMD library providing performance-portable, length-agnostic vector intrinsics with runtime dispatch across 27 CPU targets.
keyFeatures: Runtime CPU dispatch — selects the best available SIMD instruction set at runtime
27 targets across x86 (SSE2 through AVX-512), ARM (NEON/SVE/SVE2), RISC-V, POWER, IBM Z, and WebAssembly
Single source code compiles for all targets via foreach_target.h and HWY_DYNAMIC_DISPATCH
Length-agnostic (scalable) vectors: works with both fixed-width and scalable architectures (SVE, RVV)
Zero-overhead abstraction: ops map directly to CPU instructions without compiler guesswork
Contrib library: vectorized sort (VQSort), math functions, image utilities, dot products, and more
C++17 compatible, supports GCC, Clang, MSVC, and ICC
publicApiSurface: hwy/highway.h — main include for all SIMD ops
hwy/foreach_target.h — enables multi-target compilation for dynamic dispatch
hwy/base.h — compiler/platform definitions without full SIMD
hwy/aligned_allocator.h — AllocateAligned<T>, FreeAlignedBytes
hwy/cache_control.h — prefetch and cache control functions
hwy/nanobenchmark.h — precise benchmarking utilities
HWY_DYNAMIC_DISPATCH(func)(args) — call best available implementation at runtime
HWY_STATIC_DISPATCH(func)(args) — call single statically compiled implementation
HWY_EXPORT(func) — generate dispatch table for a function
ScalableTag<T> / HWY_FULL(T) — tag for full-width scalable vectors
CappedTag<T, N> / HWY_CAPPED(T, N) — tag for vectors with at most N lanes
FixedTag<T, N> — tag for exactly N-lane vectors
Zero(d), Set(d, val), Iota(d, start) — vector initialization
Load(d, ptr), Store(v, d, ptr), LoadU, StoreU — memory operations
Add, Sub, Mul, Div, MulAdd, NegMulAdd — arithmetic
And, Or, Xor, Not, AndNot — bitwise logic
Eq, Ne, Lt, Le, Gt, Ge — comparison ops returning masks
IfThenElse(mask, yes, no) — conditional select
ShiftLeft<N>(v), ShiftRight<N>(v) — bit shifts
TableLookupBytes, Shuffle* — permutation/swizzle ops
SumOfLanes(d, v), MinOfLanes, MaxOfLanes — horizontal reductions
hwy/contrib/sort/vqsort.h — VQSort vectorized quicksort
hwy/contrib/math/math-inl.h — Sin, Cos, Exp, Log, Atan2, etc.
hwy/contrib/algo/transform-inl.h — Transform, Generate, FindIf
